code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{auth,db}from'../firebase';import{doc,getDoc,setDoc}from'firebase/firestore';import{JOB_ICONS,JOBS,ROLES}from'../constants';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Profile(){const[charName,setCharName]=useState('');const[jobs,setJobs]=useState([]);const[role,setRole]=useState('');const[saved,setSaved]=useState(false);const navigate=useNavigate();const user=auth.currentUser;useEffect(()=>{const fetchProfile=async()=>{const ref=doc(db,'users',user.uid);const snap=await getDoc(ref);if(snap.exists()){const data=snap.data();setCharName(data.charName||'');setJobs(data.jobs||(data.job?[data.job]:[]));setRole(data.role||'');}};fetchProfile();},[user]);const toggleJob=job=>{setJobs(prev=>prev.includes(job)?prev.filter(j=>j!==job):[...prev,job]);};const handleSave=async()=>{if(!charName){alert('Inserisci il nome del personaggio!');return;}if(jobs.length===0){alert('Seleziona almeno un job!');return;}if(!role){alert('Seleziona un ruolo!');return;}const ref=doc(db,'users',user.uid);await setDoc(ref,{charName,jobs,job:jobs[0],role,email:user.email,displayName:user.displayName,uid:user.uid});setSaved(true);setTimeout(()=>setSaved(false),2000);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{backgroundColor:'#1a1a2e',minHeight:'100vh',color:'white',padding:'20px',maxWidth:'600px',margin:'0 auto'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>navigate('/'),style:btnStyle('#555'),children:"\u2190 Torna alla Home"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{style:{marginTop:'20px'},children:"\uD83D\uDC64 Il tuo profilo personaggio"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{maxWidth:'500px',marginTop:'30px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Nome personaggio"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{value:charName,onChange:e=>setCharName(e.target.value),placeholder:"Es. JohnWarlock",style:inputStyle}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Job (puoi selezionarne pi\xF9 di uno)"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{display:'flex',flexWrap:'wrap',gap:'10px',marginTop:'10px',marginBottom:'20px'},children:JOBS.map(j=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{onClick:()=>toggleJob(j),style:{padding:'8px 14px',borderRadius:'20px',cursor:'pointer',backgroundColor:jobs.includes(j)?'#4285f4':'#16213e',border:jobs.includes(j)?'2px solid #4285f4':'2px solid #444',fontSize:'0.95rem',transition:'all 0.2s'},children:[JOB_ICONS[j]," ",j]},j))}),jobs.length>0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{marginBottom:'20px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{color:'#aaa',marginBottom:'8px'},children:"Job selezionati:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{display:'flex',flexWrap:'wrap',gap:'8px'},children:jobs.map(j=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{style:{backgroundColor:'#4285f4',padding:'4px 12px',borderRadius:'20px',fontSize:'0.9rem'},children:[JOB_ICONS[j]," ",j]},j))})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Ruolo principale"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("select",{value:role,onChange:e=>setRole(e.target.value),style:inputStyle,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"",children:"-- Seleziona ruolo --"}),ROLES.map(r=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:r,children:r},r))]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handleSave,style:btnStyle('#2ecc71'),children:"\uD83D\uDCBE Salva profilo"}),saved&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{color:'#2ecc71',marginTop:'10px'},children:"\u2705 Profilo salvato!"})]})]});}const inputStyle={display:'block',width:'100%',padding:'10px',marginTop:'5px',marginBottom:'20px',borderRadius:'6px',border:'none',backgroundColor:'#16213e',color:'white',fontSize:'1rem'};const btnStyle=color=>({padding:'10px 20px',backgroundColor:color,color:'white',border:'none',borderRadius:'6px',cursor:'pointer',fontSize:'1rem'});export default Profile;
